title: [$250] Email - Missing "Enable your wallet" task in Concierge after logging in through the DM email

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/test-runs/TR-18133/folder/13176726/41237089/1327742405?sort=-identifier **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** leungbratt6+130410@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** iPhone 14 / iOS 26.1 **App Component:** Left Hand Navigation (LHN) ## Action Performed: Setup - Can be executed in a Secondary device or browser 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Register as a new user to the app 3. Select “Chat and split expenses with friends” and click Continue 4. Enter first and last names, then click Continue 5. Click the Find icon in the upper right corner of the LHN 6. Add an email address that does not have an Expensify account, click on it in the list below (Should be a real account with an inbox that can receive the invite) 7. Send a “Hello!” message to the new user in the DM chat Steps - Main testing device (wait about 10 - 15 minutes to receive the email) 8. Open the email inbox of the invited user 9. From the unread message email/invite, click on the link at the bottom of the email to navigate to new.expensify.com 10. Verify you do not need to use a magic link 11. Open Concierge chat 12. Verify that the app has generated a welcome message and onboarding tasks in Concierge chat ## Expected Result: Verify the listed tasks are as follows: Take a 2-minute tour, Start a chat (checked off & struck through), Split an expense, Enable your wallet. (TC Step 17) ## Actual Result: Missing the Enable your wallet task ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e3ab1a66-46bc-409b-aafc-f7d972e1ae6b [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @eVoloshchak

  • Upwork Job ID: 2044010770532183822
  • Last Price Increase: 2026-04-14

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/86619 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** leungbratt6+p2p@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Windows 11/Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Prerequisites: Two accounts: Test User A (you) and Test User B (recipient) Test User A has an Expensify Wallet set up (for "Pay with wallet" tests) Send Money - From Global Create: Scenario 3. Mark as paid from the global + button 1. Go to the Inbox tab (not inside any specific chat) 2. Tap the global + button 3. Start a send money flow and select Test User B as the recipient 4. Enter an amount and tap Next 5. On the confirmation page, tap Mark as paid Scenario 4. Pay with Wallet from the global + button 1. Go to the Inbox tab 2. Tap the global + button 3. Start a send money flow, select Test User B 4. Enter an amount and tap Next 5. On the confirmation page, tap Pay with wallet ## Expected Result: Step 5. On the confirmation page, tap Mark as paid or Pay with wallet ## Actual Result: Missing the Mark as paid or Pay with Wallet option on the confirm page ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2a0c1432-226a-412b-86cf-413b3378f36c [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87394 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** testpayment935@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Windows 11 pro /Chrome **App Component:** Chat Report View ## Action Performed: 1. Navigate to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Open any chat → click emoji picker button → pick an emoji 3. Resize the browser and 4. Click the emoji picker 5. Maximize the page while the emoji open 6. Notice the the emoji list is in the top 7. Click the compose box to write something ## Expected Result: In step 6, The emoji picker should remain in place In step 7, The compose box should focus when clicking ## Actual Result: In step 6, The emoji picker is at the top of the window In step 7, unable to focus the compose box unless we click + icon ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e43683ca-6e72-41d1-9ead-b78dda9cfffc [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87394 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** testpayment935@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Windows 11 pro /Chrome **App Component:** Chat Report View ## Action Performed: 1. Navigate to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Open any chat → click emoji picker button 3. On web, resize the browser while emoji picker is open using device tool bar 4. Try this multiple times 5. In resized view, click the emoji picker 6. Notice it is not displayed 7. Click device tool bar in order to see the web view 8. Notice the emoji picker is already shown 9. Click device tool bar in order to see the mobile view 10. Notice the repositioned emoji picker is shown ## Expected Result: The emoji picker should repositions correctly ## Actual Result: - In step 4, repositioned emoji picker is not constantly shown - in step 5-10, the emojis are not shown when clicking the emoji picker until resized again ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6ede00bc-b323-434a-91e3-d0ee4031cbdb [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
